title: 70 GRAM CONTACT ADHESIVE TUBE GLUE
features: ideal for numerous jobs around the home and in the workshop

description: 1 x 70 Gram tube of Contact Adhesive. A one part contact adhesive ideal for numerous jobs around the home and in the workshop.
